docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIN, BING QIN AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, JIAN LIN, SEN QIAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-26-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, BING QIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, BING QIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIN, JIAN LIN, SEN QIAO CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAD THE SAME CASE DECIDED IN CSM-17-861755 AND CSM-19-860797. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, COURT ORDER (PF/506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED APR-14-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, JIAN
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-05-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-26-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BING QIN LIN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANTS JIAN LIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEN QIAN LIN IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPETER REBECCA CHAU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
